resources.string: Invalid input! Make sure to enter numbers greater than 0.

1RM Calculator (GymMax) is an Android application to estimate the maximum weight you can lift for one repetition.

Created by: Gabriel Armando Manik
Class: D3IF - 48 - 04

Copyright © 2026 Gabriel.
All rights reserved.

1RM Calculator (GymMax) Results:
Lift Weight: %1$s %2$s
Reps: %3$s

Your Estimated 1RM: %4$.2f %2$s

Try the app now!
